name: Resilience — inject a 429 and verify the gateway rate-limit trace recovers

planSteps.description: Click the button 'Continue as judge — use demo tenant' and wait up to 90 seconds for the 'demo tenant (judge mode)' inventory to load
Click the primary continue/next button(s) until the live test page loads. Accept any pre-filled defaults.
The live test page loads: the heading 'Test your chatbot live' is visible
Click the button whose accessible name is 'Simulate failure: Rate limit (429)'
The control is now armed: a note containing the word 'Armed' appears (confirming the next message will inject a 429). Do NOT send a message until this armed note is confirmed visible.
Now, with the control armed, type 'What is ChatDock?' into the chat input (placeholder 'Type a message…') and press Enter
Within 40 seconds the gateway trace contains a row with the exact text '429 Rate limited' — proving the injected primary-model failure was recorded
Despite the injected failure, a final assistant reply bubble still appears in the chat widget (the conversation recovered)
